title: Balboa
writer: Federico De Urrutia, José María Elorrieta, Manuel Sebares
actors: Frank Latimore, Pilar Cansino, Jesús Puente
plot: The glorification of the campaigns led by Vasco Núñez de Balboa (1475-1519), a group of Spanish conquistadors in the territory of present-day Colombia near the Panamanian border.
